response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of full-stack experience with proven ability to architect scalable systems and demonstrated commitment to testing and TDD. Critically, his current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks directly addresses a rare requirement explicitly stated for this role. While specific technologies like Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin aren't mentioned, his track record of rapidly mastering new technologies across diverse domains suggests these are quickly acquirable. The seven-month career gap warrants discussion, but his overall profile strongly demonstrates capability for the full-stack, architecture-focused work this position demands.
strengths: Currently building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks—directly matches required skillset and a rare expertise
Designed and scaled systems handling millions of requests/second; proven ability to architect and optimize complex solutions
Deep testing and TDD commitment demonstrated through creating testing frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial) and teaching courses
concerns: Seven-month employment gap since October 2025; recent re:cinq role (April–October 2025) is vaguely described with limited detail
Missing explicit experience with Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, Playwright, and cloud platforms GCP/Azure—all listed in job requirements
Frontend development (React) less highlighted than backend; recent roles emphasize infrastructure and tooling over product features

key_factors.factor: Recent career gap and vague recent role description
